grader.method: Read every fresh canonical Embodied AI reader dossier top to bottom in registry order and assigned one holistic four-dimensional judgment only after the complete page.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The home frames embodied AI as a cumulative path from task contracts and sensing through data, policies, control, evaluation, and a reproducible study.
wholePageReview.feedback: Its promises align with the released sequence and evidence boundaries, including the required transformer-versus-diffusion VLA comparison; the arc is motivating, technically honest, and gives beginners a clear first action.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page turns an underspecified robot goal into an explicit task contract, then carries that contract through a runnable branch, transfer case, and local check.
wholePageReview.feedback: Definitions, predicates, authority, time limits, and failure semantics agree across the explanation and assessment, producing a coherent beginner-first path from vague intent to an inspectable specification.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page builds typed observation and action spaces from concrete sensor and actuator fields, then tests whether shapes, units, bounds, and semantics remain compatible.
wholePageReview.feedback: Plain-language schema motivation develops into precise executable validation and changed-case diagnosis; examples, lab outcomes, and assessment answers consistently reject numerically plausible but semantically mismatched interfaces.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page connects coordinate transforms with timestamp alignment so learners can trace which frame and capture time make a measurement usable in control.
wholePageReview.feedback: The transform arithmetic, frame composition, age and skew reasoning, executable trace, and changed-case checks agree, while the boundary keeps the deterministic example from implying calibrated physical accuracy.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page develops partial observability from a concrete hidden-state case into belief updates, attachment assumptions, uncertainty, and transfer decisions.
wholePageReview.feedback: State versus observation remains precise throughout, the worked trace makes uncertainty causal rather than decorative, and the prediction-led checks teach when a belief is justified and when hidden contact or occlusion breaks it.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The capstone synthesizes task predicates, typed interfaces, frame and time validity, state transitions, and authority into a locally verifiable task-contract artifact.
wholePageReview.feedback: Its staged commands and complete reference preserve unchanged state on invalid inputs and explicitly reject both stale and future observation and action packets; deliverables, checks, rubric, and boundary form one executable learning journey.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page explains how camera and proprioceptive packets become synchronized observations, using capture age, calibration identity, missingness, and clock-domain checks.
wholePageReview.feedback: The mechanism is accurate and observable from prose through runnable code: valid ages require zero through the limit, negative ages are future-packet failures, stale depth is rejected, and feedback supports deterministic retry without claiming sensor quality.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page walks from a calibration question through transform estimation, residual error, uncertainty, and held-out validation before allowing downstream use.
wholePageReview.feedback: Frame notation and RMS calculations remain consistent, the numerical trace exposes why low training residual is insufficient, and the changed cases teach learners to separate fit, validation, observability, and deployment bounds.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page compares spatial object representations by showing how geometry, identity, uncertainty, and task queries change what a policy can infer.
wholePageReview.feedback: Concrete coordinates and relation traces sustain the explanation, while boundary cases and prediction-led checks prevent boxes, keypoints, graphs, or maps from being treated as interchangeable ground truth.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page derives sensor fusion and tracking as recursive prediction plus measurement correction, then follows uncertainty and association through a complete changed case.
wholePageReview.feedback: The Kalman-style arithmetic, shapes, units, runnable update, and assessment reasoning agree, and the narrative makes clear that a mathematically valid filter still depends on correspondence, model, and noise assumptions.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The capstone assembles synchronized sensing, calibration, tracking, uncertainty, freshness, and provenance into a locally checked state-estimator package.
wholePageReview.feedback: Stages, commands, artifacts, exemplar, and hard gates reinforce one evidence contract; the verifier covers missing, stale, and future packets as well as schema and replay failures, so the project remains executable and honestly bounded.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page traces a demonstration from human request through safety mediation to the action actually applied, preserving authority and causal timing.
wholePageReview.feedback: Requested-versus-applied action semantics stay consistent across narrative, code, and changed cases, giving learners a precise way to retain interventions and latency instead of silently relabeling corrected behavior as autonomous evidence.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page turns trajectories into lineage-preserving datasets by connecting source episodes, derived windows, splits, hashes, and leakage checks.
wholePageReview.feedback: The full journey is technically coherent and self-contained: concrete hashes and overlap cases expose how derived samples can leak, while transfer feedback teaches when filenames, seeds, or window counts are not independent evidence.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page evaluates robot data quality through coverage, validity, intervention, provenance, and release gates rather than a single average score.
wholePageReview.feedback: Worked cells and governance decisions remain aligned from definition to local assessment, and the page teaches learners to preserve missing or unsafe slices instead of allowing easy data or volume to compensate for hard failures.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page builds action chunking on an exact typed tuple, then shows how horizon masks, decoder signatures, and execution semantics prevent cross-wired commands.
wholePageReview.feedback: The promised kind, dimension, unit, frame, rate, gripper semantics, and bounds are all enforced in runnable validation; changed cases catch reversed gripper meaning and same-number substitutes, making the learning path unusually precise and transferable.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The capstone carries demonstrations through split integrity, behavior-cloning training, support diagnostics, action execution, and locally verifiable evidence.
wholePageReview.feedback: The project stages and reference artifact keep training claims separate from deterministic checks, preserve support departure and interventions, and require runnable acceptance before comparison, yielding a complete and honest synthesis.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page explains language grounding as binding words to entities, relations, and action-relevant referents under an explicit scene and task contract.
wholePageReview.feedback: Plain definitions develop into concrete ambiguity and counterfactual cases, and prediction-led checks consistently distinguish lexical matching from grounded selection while retaining uncertainty and out-of-scope limits.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page follows multimodal policy inputs through tokenization, masking, fusion, and an action interface with explicit batch, sequence, and feature shapes.
wholePageReview.feedback: Shape arithmetic and mask semantics agree throughout the narrative, executable example, and transfer cases; learners can diagnose padding, modality alignment, and missing-token failures without mistaking the fixture for trained performance.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page develops a transformer action policy from serialized observation and action tokens through causal attention, shifted targets, and prefix-invariance checks.
wholePageReview.feedback: The runnable path implements real masking and next-action loss rather than pseudocode theater, while the explanation, changed cases, and boundaries accurately show what the deterministic forward checks establish and what requires training evidence.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page explains diffusion policies as conditional denoising over action sequences, connecting corruption, clean estimates, iterative sampling, and receding-horizon execution.
wholePageReview.feedback: The mathematical mechanism, executable denoising trace, and transfer checks agree, and the narrative carefully separates sampler states from environment actions and multimodal capacity from any claim of a trained controller.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The capstone builds one grounded VLA interface and compares causal transformer and diffusion-style action decoders under matched training and evaluation evidence.
wholePageReview.feedback: It fulfills the course promise with executable trained paths, identical clean targets, update counts, bounds, grounding, and evaluator contracts; invariance and denoising receipts, artifacts, gates, and scope limits form a complete comparison.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page connects feedback error to bounded control action, delay, saturation, anti-windup, and stability decisions in a concrete closed-loop trace.
wholePageReview.feedback: Equations, signs, units, runnable behavior, and changed-case feedback remain consistent, letting beginners see why an apparently correct controller can fail under delay or saturation without turning a fixture into a stability certificate.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page shows how a learned or specified world model supports robot planning by rolling candidate actions forward, applying feasibility gates, and choosing a safe fallback.
wholePageReview.feedback: Prediction, cost, constraint, and empty-feasible-set behavior agree across the explanation and runnable planner; changed cases prevent low predicted cost from overriding uncertainty or safety assumptions.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page organizes hierarchical behavior as typed skills with preconditions, invariants, termination, and postconditions connected to a supervisory controller.
wholePageReview.feedback: Skill boundaries and authority remain precise from prose through executable guards and transfer cases, teaching learners to reject type-compatible but semantically invalid transitions and to preserve bounded fallback behavior.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page develops sim-to-real identification from an identifiable parameter question through excitation, estimation, held-out prediction, residual analysis, and bounded transfer.
wholePageReview.feedback: The deterministic fixture supports its arithmetic without pretending to measure hardware, and the comparison logic correctly separates fitting from validation, confounding, and residual mismatch across the entire learning path.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The capstone unifies failure detection, intervention authority, recovery state, watchdog timing, rollback, and human control in a locally auditable operations package.
wholePageReview.feedback: Freshness is derived from timestamps and both stale and future packets trigger bounded rejection; consecutive-state reset, receipts, stage checks, exemplar, and residual-risk boundary create a coherent executable safety narrative.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page builds an embodied evaluation matrix that preserves task shifts, assistance, hard gates, independent denominators, uncertainty, and declared aggregation.
wholePageReview.feedback: Wilson calculations and macro weighting are correct, the runnable and changed cases expose correlated-frame inflation and post-hoc exclusion, and the page consistently refuses to turn finite simulation cells into deployment validity.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page distinguishes robustness from held-out generalization, then uses controlled counterfactual pairs and severity curves to locate shortcuts and failure onset.
wholePageReview.feedback: Nuisance versus causal changes, lineage isolation, response expectations, and confidence failures agree across the worked story and assessments, while boundaries prevent enumerated shifts from becoming an open-world claim.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page separates release-window latency evidence from per-command admission, then connects both to watchdog, provenance, rollback, and incident operations.
wholePageReview.feedback: The nearest-rank p99 arithmetic, operating-mode authority, revision receipts, and runnable hold decisions remain consistent; transfer cases teach that logging a late command is not containment and that rollback requires compatible state.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page turns an accelerator experiment into portable smoke and full profiles with pinned dependencies, paired rows, exact invariants, variable observations, and stop rules.
wholePageReview.feedback: Every promise matches the commands and provider guidance: --device auto is the shared CPU, CUDA, and MPS path, resolved hardware is recorded, CUDA is optional, and no stochastic winner or hardware-safety claim is invented before reviewed evidence.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The final capstone reproduces a pinned baseline, independently replays every raw transition, and isolates a gain intervention under paired seeds and non-compensable gates.
wholePageReview.feedback: Runnable smoke and full commands, verifier receipts, complete seed-by-arm rows, attempt-gated references, rubric, artifacts, and bounded decision rules form a rigorous cumulative study in which null, mixed, or hard-gate-failing results remain valid evidence.
